input.label: BIG-IP Hostname:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication = HTTPS | stats count by hostname

chart.title: Top Attacked Contexts (alarmed)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS unit_hostname = $hostname$ action="ALERT"| top context_name limit=20

chart.title: Top Attacked Contexts (blocked)
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS unit_hostname = $hostname$ action="BLOCK"| top context_name limit=20
